contribution_description:

- Description: Updated Oracle to utilize Macbook reminders for to do list

  *Shipped*

  *Community (Telegram log):* https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1qbZZhf-_7xzmDTriaJVWj6OZshyQsFkdsAV8-pyzASQ/edit

  - Kirsten assembled our first box of single estate chocolate (1h 45m)
  - 3h strategy session with Elizabeth Wong on distributing into private schools + Salvation Army
  - Shipment coordination: Ilheus Brazil → SF underway; 100kg Coopercabruca purchase in progress
  - Outreach to Edge & Node and Block 71 (Web3 partners)
